  add        Installs a pfx certificate to personal certificate of the current

Copyright (C) 2026 GSoft.CertificateTool

  -f, --file              

  -b, --base64            

  -p, --password          Required. 

  -t, --thumbprint        Required. 

  -s, --store-name        (Default: My) Certificate store name (My, Root, 
                          etc.). See

                          me' for more information.

                          cation' for more information.

  --version               Display version information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Installs a pfx certificate to personal certificate of the current user.

options.description: Certificate store location (CurrentUser, LocalMachine, etc.). See 'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation' for more information.
Certificate store name (My, Root, etc.). See 'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName' for more information.

staticCommands.name: remove
staticCommands.description: Removes a pfx certificate from the personal certificate of the current user.

options.description: Certificate store location (CurrentUser, LocalMachine, etc.). See 'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation' for more information.
Certificate store name (My, Root, etc.). See 'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName' for more information.
